publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-03-09 23:59:08 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Resistance publications

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Ephemeral publications documenting cultures of resistance in response to economic, social, and ecological problems caused by unrestrained corporate profit, including grassroots movements seeking environmental sustainability and anti-capitalist models. The materials were actively collected at protest marches and rallies in public places.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Resistance publications, #8819. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Images Of The Revolution, Alpine Anarchist Productions

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Thirty three full page illustrations

did.unittitle: Anarchism
Anarchist Federation: The Role Of The Revolutionary Organisation
The Angry Brigade 1967-1984

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents and Chronology with introduction by Jean Weier.

did.unittitle: You Stupid People!, Ezio Flavio Bazzo

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: An Open Manifesto to Human Stupidity. Critical counter-culture study of education.

did.unittitle: An Anarchist ABC, Louisa Sarah Bevington

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: First edition in book form. Bevington is a significant figure of British Anarchism, activist, poet and writer of social and economic matters of importance to the Working Class and Louise Michel's translator. One of 30 copies printed.

did.unittitle: A Rough Guide To Reality, Enki Bilal (I.E. Enes Bilalović)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bilal's art is highly appreciated and consumed in the alternative sub-culture.

did.unittitle: Biofuelwatch

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Highly biodiversity and carbon rich forests are being clear-cut in the US, Canada and Brazil, but burning biomass actually emits more Greenhouse gases than burning coal!

did.unittitle: The Sea Books, Chris Bird

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Both story and illustrations by Bird.

did.unittitle: Poverty For Near Beginners, Navvie Brick

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A cartoon booklet exploring through the image the famous report 'Poverty in the United Kingdom'.

did.unittitle: Anarchist Tension, Alfredo M. Bonano
Fictitious Movement And Real Movement, Alfredo M. Bonano

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chapters on : The Movement of the Exploited, Organization, The Primary of Doing, &c.

did.unittitle: New Songs For Old, Rip Bulkeley (I.E. Robert Ion Pierson)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Songs brought unity to the cause in the Slave Plantations, down in the mines, in the unfit factories, in the wars, in the refugee camps, in Socialist rallies, Peace vigils, and in many more concentrations where People protest.

did.unittitle: Suverenitet Potreba, Ankica Čakardić

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sovereignty Needs.

did.unittitle: An Introduction To The Arms Trade, Campaign Against The Arms Trade

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Arms Trade is a legal trade and exists to provide weapons to those who can pay and use them to kill other fellow human beings.

did.unittitle: More Than Enough?, Catholic Agency For Overseas Development

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One World Week to Build a Just, Peaceful and Sustainable World.

did.unittitle: Centre De Documentation Et D'Études Sociales
Anarchosyndicalisme Et Autonomie Populaire, Cnt-Ait

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: On the revolutionary specificity of Anarcho-Syndicalism.

did.unittitle: Espagne 1936: Révolution Autogestionnaire, Cnt-Ait

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Autogestion as the only valuable alternative to capitalist and bureaucratic societies.

did.unittitle: For What We Are About To Lose, Creative Commons

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Somerleyton Road and Carlton Mansions. Writings and oral history by artists, poets, revolutionaires and musicians who lived in the dilapidated Victorian houses before their eviction in 2014.

did.unittitle: The Cult Of Abdullah Ocalan And The Rojava Revolution

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A Kurdish anarchist criticism of Öcalan and of Negri, Graeber, Wallerstein and Holloway.

did.unittitle: A Critique Of Marxism, Sam Dolgoff

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Edition limited to 50 copies for personal distribution.

did.unittitle: Drax Ten Years On

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of reflexions on the Climate Movement since the first UK Climate Camp at Drax in 2006.

did.unittitle: Armed Struggle And Social Revolution, Epanastatikos Agonas

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letters, texts & communiques from a Greek anarchist urban guerrilla group during 2003 - 2010.

did.unittitle: Resisting Evictions Across Europe, European Action Coalition
A Frack-tivist's Introduction To EU Legislation, European Free Alliance

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Exposes the European Union lack of legislation on the extraction of unconventional fossil fuels.

did.unittitle: Calais, Kate Evans

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Coloured pictorial narrative of the inhospitable daily life in the Calais Refugee Camp.

did.unittitle: International Rebellion, Extintion Rebellion

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This 'too white, too middle class' (as perceived by the Labour Party) organization questions the UK authorities to explain themselves on the Global Food Shortage, Mass Starvation and Social Collapse.

did.unittitle: Non-Violent Disruption, Extintion Rebellion

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: We face floods, wildfires, extreme weather, crop failure, mass migration and the breakdown of society.

did.unittitle: London And The 1984-5 Miners' Strike, David Featherstone & Diarmaid Kelliher

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Over 150,000 miners went on strike action in 1984 against the widespread pit closures sponsored by the Margaret Thatcher Government in Kent, South Wales and Nottinghamshire.

did.unittitle: Free Mumia, Organise Now!

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A call to free Mumia Abu-Jamal and to abolish the 'racist death penalty'.

did.unittitle: Pour Un Projet Communiste, Gauche Communiste
Go On Girl! Self Defence For Women

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Practical introduction fully illustrated.

did.unittitle: Tech Tools For Activism, Hacktion Lab

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Introduction to the effective use of technology for the activist with strong emphasis on security.

did.unittitle: A Handbook For Direct Action

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chapters on Ethical Shoplifting, Blockading Techniques, Sabotage, Media Coverage, Dealing with the Police, Your Rights, &c.

did.unittitle: Id Cards - Has Big Brother Government Arrived?, Harringay Against Id Cards

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A Resisting call against the big corporations interested in those opposing them.

did.unittitle: Sex, Gender & Women's Rights, Jeni Harvey

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This work was not allowed to be distributed at the 2018 Book Fair, publisher and exhibiting bookseller were forced out of the premises.

did.unittitle: '…As Play' A Primer, Run Hunt

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The transcendence of art and its re-entry into everyday life as play.

did.unittitle: Insurrectionary Anarchism In Mexico

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Communiques and declarations of Direct Action anarchist groups engaged on military acts in 2011.

did.unittitle: First Of May 2014, International Communist Party

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Hundred years after the outbreak of the First Imperialist War, calls for resumption of workers' struggles.

did.unittitle: International Solidarity For All! Towards An International Campaign Of Solidarity To The Greek People
La Récupération Politique Dans Les Mouvements De Grève Étudiants, CNT-AIT
Back From The Battlefield, Chris Jones

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The use of drones for remote warfare and enemy surveillance is used by the police to watch the city dwellers in the UK.

did.unittitle: Gender In Czech Anarchist Movement, Marta Kolárová

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Description and analysis of the contemporary Czech Anarchist Movement.

did.unittitle: Anarchy In By, Pavliuk Konoval'Chik

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Anarkhicheskoe Dvizhenie v Belarusi. A condensed history of the movement in Belarus since 1905.

did.unittitle: Greed, Leon Kuhn

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Anti-capitalist work fully illustrated by Leon Kuhn and Chris Bird.

did.unittitle: Left Unity Manifesto

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Basically an Anti-NATO organization.

did.unittitle: L'ABC Du Libertaire, Jules Lermina

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also includes J. Solal: L'Anarchie à la portée de tous. Notes and postface by same author.

did.unittitle: London Rising Tide: Funny Weather We're Having At The Moment Isn't It Dear?

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Created by Kate Evans, that 'dangerous environmental extremist!'

did.unittitle: What Is It To Complain Today?, Hamish Macpherson

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A complaint is limited, if not completely futile, as long as it is the complain that decides on how the complaint should be made.

did.unittitle: Still Fighting For Social Justice, Jonathan Maunder.
Moments Of Struggle: Illustrated Introduction To Anarchist History

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Fully illustrated introduction.

did.unittitle: Bakunin And The Human Subject, Brian Morris
Autonomni Dělnické Boje V Čine 2010, Mouvement Communiste

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Analysis of the factory strikes during 2010 in China.

did.unittitle: Jak A Proč Bojovat Proti Propouštění?, Mouvement Communiste

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: How and why to fight.

did.unittitle: Státní Fiskālní Krize A Příklad Řecka, Mouvement Communiste

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Marxist interpretation of contemporary global financial crisis and proletarian politics.

did.unittitle: The Mysteries Of The (H)I-(T)Ching

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A Beginner's Guide to Hitching in Great Britain by Merrick.

did.unittitle: Women Chain Makers, National Union Of Teachers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The strike of women workers of Cradley Heath in 1910.

did.unittitle: Europe 1:1 Information Map, No Borders

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The No Border Network, a practical expression of Resistance, was created as a response to Neo-Liberal economic policies which have catapulted whole nations into debt, poverty, hunger and war.

did.unittitle: Kiahan A Tale Of Migration, No Borders

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Fully illustrated, no artist name given, Afghan children in European detention centres.

did.unittitle: No Comment: Defendant's Guide To Arrest

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Prepared and updated by the Legal Defence and Monitoring Group. 5th edition.

did.unittitle: No Sweat (I Can't Seem To Wash The Stench Of Sweated Labour From My New Designer Top!)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Superb comic-strip based on the Kukdong factory strike in Puebla, Mexico. against sweat shops by Andy Vine. No Sweat is an organization opposing child labour, forced overtime, poverty wages, unsafe conditions, harassment of women workers, terror and intimidation of trade unionists. No Sweat aims at publicize, expose and help stamp out sweatshop employment from the small back street sweatshop to some of the biggest international corporations.

did.unittitle: The # Nottip Times

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The goal of the TTIP was to remove regulation 'Barriers' which restricted profits made by the corporations.

did.unittitle: Democratic Confederalism, Abdullah Öcalan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The chief ideologist of the PKK on the failure of Capitalist Modernity and the Nation-State.

did.unittitle: Liberating Life: Woman's Revolution, Abdullah Öcalan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writing Based on his speeches on sex and gender.

did.unittitle: War And Peace In Kurdistan, Abdullah Öcalan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Perspectives for a political solution of the Kurdish Question.

did.unittitle: On Wikileaks, Bitcoin, Copyleft: Three Critiques Of Hacktivism

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of writings on activism in the digital realm.

did.unittitle: They Used To Give Us Cakes, Paul Petard

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Grumbles of an Xmas postal sorter.

did.unittitle: Anal Play For Men & Women, Provider Services

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Exploring the erotic sensations of better sex.

did.unittitle: How To Set Up A Housing Co-Operative, Radical Routes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Legal structures, money rising, case stories and more related housing co-ops.

did.unittitle: How To Work Out Your Ecological Footprint, Radical Routes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Tools and resources for ecological foot printing.

did.unittitle: Remembering the Real WW1, Free School

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Talks and discussions on resistance to the war effort and revolution.

did.unittitle: Monarchy Must Go, Republic

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Monarchy gives the P.M. the power to commit British troops overseas without consulting Parliament.

did.unittitle: Share the World's Resources: An Introduction

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brief presentation of the Movement.

did.unittitle: Striking Back, Mike Simons

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographs of the Great Miners' Strike 1984-1985. A photographic record of Neo-Liberalism in Britain.

did.unittitle: If I Had A Hammer… Decommissioning The War Machine, Smash Edo Organisation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Weapons developed by the US have been used in Iraq and Palestine against civilian population.

did.unittitle: Summer Of Resistance, Smash Edo Organisation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brief introduction to EDO/ITT complicity in conflict, coups and war crimes.

did.unittitle: Don't Cross Picket Lines!, Solidarity Federation IWA

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: There is a labour dispute in this workplace. It has reached a point where people feel their only option is to strike…

did.unittitle: Strike: A Guide to Walking Out, Solidarity Federation IWA

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Federation summarizes the experience for workers who for the first time strike.

did.unittitle: The Stuff Your Boss Doesn't Want You to Know, Solidarity Federation IWM

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some key employment rights, working time regulations, health and safety basics, grievance proceedings.

did.unittitle: Switch Off Poundland and End Unpaid Work!, Solidarity Federation IWM

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The unemployed is required to work for free. Workfare is an attack on all, not only the unemployed.

did.unittitle: DIY Activist in Japan, Hikaru Tanaka

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The anarchist alternative in Japan.

did.unittitle: Kicking Ass For The Working Class, United Voices Of The World

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A grassroots trade union organizing the most oppressed and unrepresented workers.

did.unittitle: Sanctions On Iraq, Voices In The Wilderness

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: World opinion has turned against economic sanctions, but Britain and the US hold against the world.

did.unittitle: The Very Hungry Pipeline, Paul Walker

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Stories from Rossport Solidarity Camp. A text book of the struggle.

did.unittitle: What Next?, Watermelon

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Green Left 2013 Spring Conference.

did.unittitle: Beyond ESF, Wombles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Five days and nights of anti-authoritarian ideas and action. Direct action, occupation of buildings, struggle against hierarchical power, reclaiming the streets, subverting the brand culture, &c.

did.unittitle: Women In Black

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A short history of Women in Black, their non-violent actions and the Feminist perspective.

did.unittitle: From The Front Line: Star Wars And Globalisation, Yorkshire Cnd

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A short history of Women in Black, their non-violent actions and the Feminist perspective.

did.unittitle: Avoiding Anti-Semitism, Young Jewish Left

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A primer or, how to effectively criticize Israel without become anti-semitic.
